details.productUrlName: Done for the Day Galaxy Foil

customAttributes.description: At the beginning of your end step, if you control an Employee, a Performer, or a Robot, you may get [TIX] or create a Treasure token. If you control all three, you may put a sticker on a nonland permanent you own.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 10/7/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: Punchy was programmed to do two things: punch tickets and love punching tickets.
